title: Amazingly Vanilla
description: ✨ Amazingly Vanilla is a Vanilla+ modpack that refreshes Minecraft with enhanced visuals 🎨, immersive sounds 🎧, smooth animations 🕺, a new GUI 🖥️, QoL improvements ⚙️ — all while staying true to the original vanilla feel.
body:
**Amazingly Vanilla** is a carefully curated Vanilla+ modpack designed to refresh Minecraft without losing its original soul 🧱

This modpack focuses on **visual enhancements 🎨, immersive sound design 🎧, and quality-of-life improvements ⚙️**, all while staying true to the vanilla experience. Every addition feels natural, subtle, and intentional — as if it could have been part of the base game.

With improved **animations 🕺, a refined GUI 🖥️, new musics 🔉, enhanced ambience 🌿, and lightweight shaders 🌤️**, Amazingly Vanilla brings a modern touch to Minecraft while keeping gameplay familiar, smooth, and accessible.

🚫 No overcomplicated mechanics
🚫 No unnecessary content
✅ Just a cleaner, more immersive, and better-feeling vanilla experience

**Minecraft, the way it should feel — amazingly vanilla. ✨**

# ⚠️ Don't forget to choose between voxy support and distant hoizon support

![Voxy / Distant Horizon support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab993cfc8829eacd5a7e117a2bbb3fd31b1289ee.png)
